subcodes.first_line: Thy unity is inscrutable, O my God, to all except them that have recognized Him Who is the Manifestation of Thy singleness
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی لایعرف توحیدک الا بمعرفه مظهر فردانیتک و مطلع وحدانیتک من یری له ضدا
subcodes.subjects: @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
